title: RentifyNow
description: SaaS platform for solo landlords to manage properties, tenants, finances, documents, and messages, with a built-in AI assistant.
metrics: Built and operated end to end, from product design to VPS infrastructure
highlights: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture for independent landlords
Property, tenant, finance, document, and messaging workflows
Built-in AI assistant
Owned deployment, monitoring, and production operations

title: HouseifyNow
description: Smart home management SaaS with property tracking, maintenance scheduling, and financial oversight for homeowners.
metrics: Homeowner-focused platform with integrated financial and maintenance tools
highlights: Homeowner dashboard with property portfolio overview
Maintenance scheduling and contractor management
Financial tracking with expense categorization
Cross-platform support via Tauri (Web, Desktop, Mobile)

title: GoalifyNow
description: Goal tracking and habit management SaaS helping users set, track, and achieve personal and professional goals.
metrics: Productivity platform with habit tracking and goal analytics
highlights: Goal creation with milestones and progress tracking
Habit streaks and analytics dashboard
Cross-platform native apps via Tauri
Shared infrastructure with DoifyNow ecosystem

title: DoifyNow
description: The mother organization and shared infrastructure hub powering the entire SaaS product ecosystem including RentifyNow, HouseifyNow, and GoalifyNow.
metrics: Infrastructure hub managing shared databases, monitoring, and deployment
highlights: Centralized infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, monitoring
Grafana + Prometheus + Loki observability stack
Shared .NET libraries consumed by all product microservices
VPS deployment orchestration via Dokploy

title: DeployifyNow
description: Self-hosted deployment platform with VPS provisioning, CI/CD orchestration, real-time build logs via SignalR, and full infrastructure management through Dokploy.
metrics: Infrastructure automation platform managing VPS deployments and CI/CD pipelines
highlights: Real-time build logs and deployment status via SignalR
GitHub App integration for repo management and webhooks
VPS agent architecture with remote command execution
Database provisioning with automated backups

title: League Plus
description: Desktop application for League of Legends players providing real-time match analytics, performance tracking, and statistical insights to improve gameplay.
metrics: Enhanced player performance tracking with 50+ statistics analyzed per match
highlights: Real-time game data integration via Riot Games API
Custom analytics dashboard with performance metrics
Match history analysis and trend visualization

title: Distributed Database
description: Scalable distributed database system implementing consensus algorithms for data consistency across multiple nodes with fault tolerance.
metrics: Achieved 99.9% data consistency across distributed nodes
highlights: Implemented Raft consensus algorithm for leader election
Fault-tolerant replication across multiple nodes
Custom query language and execution engine

title: Image Steganography
description: Security tool for hiding encrypted messages within images using LSB steganography techniques with AES-256 encryption.
metrics: Secure message encoding with undetectable payload embedding
highlights: LSB (Least Significant Bit) encoding for invisible data hiding
AES-256 encryption for payload security
Support for multiple image formats (PNG, BMP, JPEG)

title: Portfolio Website
description: Responsive, bilingual portfolio built with React 19, TypeScript, Vite, and accessible component patterns.
metrics: Code-split sections, structured SEO data, and automated quality checks
highlights: Responsive design with mobile-first approach
Multi-language support (EN/PL)
SEO optimized with structured data markup

title: Discord Bot
description: Feature-rich Discord bot with moderation tools, music playback, custom commands, and server analytics for community management.
metrics: Serving 500+ users across multiple Discord servers
highlights: Advanced moderation and auto-mod capabilities
Custom command framework with permissions system
Server analytics and user engagement tracking

title: Task Manager Pro
description: Full-featured task management application with drag-and-drop kanban boards, team collaboration, and productivity analytics.
metrics: Intuitive task organization with drag-and-drop interface
highlights: Real-time collaboration with SignalR
Kanban board with drag-and-drop functionality
Task prioritization and deadline tracking
